title: schoepfia schreberi
intro: Schoepfia schreberi, also known as the Chinese parasol tree or Chinese parasol, is a species of evergreen tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoepfia schreberi include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Schoepfia schreberi is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
